prompt: Trace the early history of the Fairmont Costume Collection in Fairmont. First identify its authoritative custodian, then fetch an official accession note or institutional history that states where the collection was originally housed. Do not confuse the founding site with its current address. Give the final answer as exactly three bullets labeled Answer, Evidence, and Caveat; include the source ID in Evidence.

fetch_primary.title: Fairmont Costume Collection accession history
fetch_primary.content: Accession note 1 states that the Fairmont Costume Collection began in the wardrobe loft of the Regent Playhouse. It moved to the present repository in 1998; the note gives no reason for the move.

fetch_alternate.title: Alternate official record for Fairmont Costume Collection
fetch_alternate.content: The archived founding memorandum states that the Fairmont Costume Collection was first housed in the wardrobe loft of the Regent Playhouse.
